# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Why

Explain the problem being solved or the reason for the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Runtime
- [ ] Web UI
- [ ] Tauri desktop shell
- [ ] Adapter logic
- [ ] Documentation only

## Validation

List the commands or checks you ran.

```bash
# example
pnpm --filter @aal/overlay --filter @aal/ui --filter @aal/shared exec tsc --noEmit
```

## Screenshots Or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots, recordings, or logs.

## Documentation Sync

- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] docs updated if needed
- [ ] AGENTS.md updated if structure or conventions changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if the change is user-facing
